action.reasoning: Observation: iteration 14 LGBM MAE + label norm gave test IC 0.0470, rank_IC 0.0525, val IC 0.0698 (gap ~0.02). Analysis: Overfitting persists despite deeper trees and MAE loss. DART boosting + stronger subsampling/regularization may improve generalization. Decision: switch LGBM to DART, subsample/colsample=0.5, L1/L2=1.0, min_child_samples=30, lr=0.02. Keep label norm. Submit eval.
